title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-control-center bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-control-center is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: This package contains configuration utilities for the GNOME desktop, which allow to configure accessibility options, desktop fonts, keyboard and mouse properties, sound setup, desktop theme and background, user interface properties, screen resolution, and other settings.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Opening the Power panel in el96 causes gnome-control-center to crash [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-109584)

full_text:
An update for gnome-control-center is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

This package contains configuration utilities for the GNOME desktop, which allow to configure accessibility options, desktop fonts, keyboard and mouse properties, sound setup, desktop theme and background, user interface properties, screen resolution, and other settings.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Opening the Power panel in el96 causes gnome-control-center to crash [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-109584)
